description:
Returns server's [[Namespace|namespace]]. This namespace is only available on the server for the server's uptime duration (same as [[uiNamespace]]).
All [[Arma 3: Server Side Scripting|server event handlers]], which are available in [[Arma 3: Server Config File|server config]], use this namespace.
examples:
<sqf>
if (isServer) then
{
	hint str allVariables serverNamespace;
}
else
{
	hint "you do not have permission!";
};
</sqf>
name: serverNamespace

ret.desc: on the server, [[Nothing]] on clients or in single-player.
